steps.name: Solution-shaper agent with 5-phase approach selection workflow
steps.description: Markdown agent implementing DEEP READ, APPROACH GENERATION, APPROACH SCORING, CONVERGENCE, and CHECKPOINT phases. Reads solicitation file, company profile, and proposal state. Produces approach-brief.md.
criteria: Agent file at agents/sbir-solution-shaper.md follows plugin convention (YAML frontmatter, 200-400 lines)
Agent reads solicitation from topic.solicitation_file path and extracts objectives, eval criteria, constraints
Agent generates 3-5 technically distinct approaches using forward mapping, reverse mapping, and prior art
Agent scores each approach across 5 dimensions with 0.00-1.00 scores referencing company profile data
Checkpoint presents approve/revise/explore/restart/quit options following existing checkpoint pattern

steps.name: Approach-evaluation skill with scoring rubrics and brief schema
steps.description: Domain knowledge skill covering: scoring dimension definitions with default weights, approach generation patterns (forward/reverse/prior-art), commercialization quick-assessment framework, and approach-brief.md schema.
criteria: Defines 5 scoring dimensions with default weights, score ranges, and scoring guidance
Documents 3 generation methods (forward mapping, reverse mapping, prior art awareness)
Includes approach-brief.md section schema for agent reference
Commercialization quick-assessment covers pathway types, dual-use criteria, market relevance levels

steps.name: Shape command with revise flag and agent dispatch
steps.description: Command file dispatching to sbir-solution-shaper. Handles initial invocation and --revise flag for approach revision. Documents prerequisites and usage.
criteria: Command at commands/sbir-proposal-shape.md follows plugin convention (YAML frontmatter with description and argument-hint)
Default invocation dispatches to @sbir-solution-shaper for initial approach selection
--revise flag dispatches with revision context (re-read company profile, accept user notes)
Prerequisites documented: Go decision required, company profile required

steps.name: Wave-agent-mapping update and strategist integration
steps.description: Update wave-agent-mapping skill to include solution-shaper in Wave 0 routing and approach-selection checkpoint. Update strategist agent to read approach-brief.md in Phase 1 GATHER (backward-compatible: no-op if missing).
criteria: Wave-agent-mapping includes solution-shaper in Wave 0 agents and command routing table
Approach Selection checkpoint added to checkpoint definitions (Wave 0, approve/revise/explore/restart/quit)
Strategist agent Phase 1 GATHER reads approach-brief.md when available
Strategist proceeds without approach brief for existing proposals (backward compatible)
Proposal-state.json approach_selection section documented in state schema references
